name: add_healthcheck_go
avoid: do not expose sensitive env vars
brief_template:
To add a health check to a Go service:
1. Add /healthz endpoint in your router (e.g., chi, gorilla, stdlib)
2. Return HTTP 200 with JSON: {"status":"ok"}
3. Optionally check database connectivity
4. Add test in _test.go for the handler
5. Update Dockerfile HEALTHCHECK if present
